headline: Emerson Electric (EMR) Valuation Check After Solid Second Quarter Earnings And Guidance Update
summary: Why Emerson Electric’s latest quarter matters for investors Emerson Electric (EMR) has investors’ attention after reporting second quarter earnings that included year over year growth in sales and net income, alongside a modest increase in full year guidance. For the quarter ended March 31, 2026, Emerson Electric reported sales of US$4,562 million compared with US$4,432 million a year earlier. Net income was US$618 million versus US$485 million, with basic and diluted earnings per share from...
